title: Dusk Craft
description: Ever wanted a solid RPG experience in our lovely game Minecraft? well i got you covered.
body:
**a all in one RPG , adventure modpack for a enhanced rpg proggression feel**

this modpack contains very many mods that improve different aspects of the game , so i can promise you a pretty new and different experience.

### WARNING : you need a good amount of ram for the pack(8Gb dedicated to the game is recomended)

## Features
- More Equipment like weapons , armors and artifacts
- Enhanced Visuals (3D objects , enhanced GUIs , Shaders)
- Expanded Farming & Cooking ("Let's do" mods)
- Player Instanced Loot (there is loot for everyone)
- Remastered Ending (Getting to end & Fighting the dragon is way more interesting)
- High Immersion (Enhanced Animations , Higher Quality Sounds , etc)
- Quaality of life enhancements (Equipment comparing , Pickup notifier , etc)
- Increasing Difficulty (All those power would need a challenge ;D)
- Overhauled WorldGen and structures
- Optimizations
